title: Figure 1 in Development and validation of a real-time SYBR green PCR method for the detection and differentiation of Babesia and Theileria species (Apicomplexa: Piroplasmida) in hard ticks and cattle blood from Thailand
author: Kyaw, May Thazin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. Standard curve of plasmid DNA dilutions (105–1 copies/µL): a) B. bigemina, b) B. bovis, c) T. annulata, d) T. orientalis, and e) T. sinensis.
